case_title: ANGELA LAM VS. JOSEPH BRIAN DUGAN et al

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN MICHAEL DALEY.

AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
